Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Help Tidak with his alchemy prototype.

I made a recipe for an alchemical prototype. It was magnificent.

Jodoc was going to have someone in Crescentia manufacture it, but my letters go unanswered. Someone should go there and find out what the hold-up is.
Here, take the recipe back to Tidak! No one here knows how to make heads or tails of it.

Harumph. They didn't understand my recipe, that's all.

There's a look intelligent on this ...want to give it a shot?
